ResearchProjectDef.label: void initiate armor
ResearchProjectDef.description: Craft armor made from bioferrite and gold. The bioferrite feeds on the wearer's psychic prescence to grow stronger.

ResearchProjectDef.label: void initiate weapons
ResearchProjectDef.description: Craft weapons made from bioferrite and gold. The bioferrite feeds on the wearer's psychic prescence to grow stronger.

ResearchProjectDef.label: bioferrite limbs
ResearchProjectDef.description: Learn how to implant humans (willing or unwilling) with bioferrite virions, which grow into useable body parts but kill the host when extrcted.
